'''Coveway''' was a harsh [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] situated in the [[Koradin sector/Legends|Koradin sector]]. [[Colonist/Legends|Colonized]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it eventually became home to the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jak Bremen]], who eventually became a [[Constable/Legends|constable]] of the [[Unidentified village (Coveway)|village]] he resided in and started a family.

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Empire established a hidden [[Unidentified Imperial garrison (Coveway)|garrison]] on Coveway. The [[Unidentified Imperial commander (Coveway)|commander]] of the [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] decided that his [[Mission to Coveway|assignment]] would be achieved best if the native residents of the local area were eliminated, and Bremen's village was destroyed, with his [[Jak Bremen's wife|wife]] and [[Jak Bremen's daughter|daughter]] being [[Death/Legends|killed]]. The constable, who was away at the time, tracked the killers to the garrison and eventually helped a recently arrived [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] strike team to neutralize the Imperial base. In return, the Rebels took Bremen off-world, and he became a member of the Alliance.

==Description==
Coveway was a tiny terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TTTS" /> located in the [[Coveway system/Legends|Coveway system]], a part of the [[Koradin sector/Legends|Koradin sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The conditions on Coveway were harsh, and the planet's wildlife included dangerous animals.<ref name="TTTS" />

==History==
===A new life===
[[File:Jak_Bremen.jpg|thumb|right|180px|During the Galactic Civil War, the future New Republic Colonel Jak Bremen lived on Coveway.]]
During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Jak Bremen]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] survivor of an Imperial [[Death/Legends|massacre]] on<ref name="TTTS" /> the [[Tammuz sector/Legends|Tammuz sector]]<ref name="EAOC Shiffrin">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Shiffrin system/Legends|Shiffrin system]]</ref> planet [[Shiffrin]] who had turned to wandering the Outer Rim Territories, eventually settled in a [[Unidentified village (Coveway)|village]] on Coveway. Bremen became the village's [[Constable/Legends|constable]], with his duties including helping to fend off threatening local fauna. The constable eventually [[Marriage/Legends|married]] a [[Jak Bremen's wife|local woman]] with whom he [[Reproduction/Legends|sired]] an [[Jak Bremen's daughter|infant daughter]].<ref name="TTTS" />

At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], an [[Unidentified Imperial garrison (Coveway)|Imperial garrison]] was established on Coveway for a [[Mission to Coveway|mission]] by the Empire's [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|Commission for the Preservation of the New Order]]. The [[Unidentified Imperial commander (Coveway)|commander]] of the [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] eventually decided that the Empire's mission objective would be achieved more expediently by eliminating the natives of the garrison's area, which included the village where Bremen lived. One [[Standard day/Legends|day]], while Bremen was away on a [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] trip, killers from the garrison destroyed the constable's village and murdered his [[Gender/Legends|wife]] and [[Youngling/Legends|child]].<ref name="TTTS" />

===Retribution===
After returning to the village, Bremen tracked the killers to the garrison but, realizing he could not avenge his loss on his own, fled and eventually arrived in another village. There, the former constable encountered a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[operative]] who was part of a Rebel strike team that had recently arrived on Coveway with the intention of eliminating the Imperial garrison.<ref name="TTTS" />

Upon being introduced to the team, Bremen offered to lead the Rebels through the Imperial base's defense network. The strike team agreed to take Bremen off-planet afterward, and with Bremen's help, the Rebels neutralized the garrison, with Bremen subsequently becoming a member of the Alliance and later, a [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] with the Alliance's successor, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="TTTS" />

==Inhabitants==
Coveway was inhabited by a hardworking and determined people who originated in a colonization expedition and who sustained themselves regardless of the demanding conditions of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. At some point, an Imperial garrison was also established on the planet.<ref name="TTTS" />

==Locations==
Two small villages were located on Coveway. During the reign of the Galactic Empire, a hidden Imperial garrison was established on the planet.<ref name="TTTS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Coveway was first mentioned in the [[1994]] ''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'', written by [[Eric S. Trautmann|Eric Trautmann]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TLC">''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Coveway [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square I-18.<ref name="TEA" />
